LanguageData.EE_BurnDegree1Desc: First-degree burn: Epidermal burn, mild redness and swelling.
LanguageData.EE_BurnDegree2Desc: Second-degree burn: Partial skin damage, blister formation. Extremely painful and prone to infection.
LanguageData.EE_BurnDegree3Desc: Third-degree burn: Necrosis of full-thickness skin and subcutaneous tissues. Extremely prone to severe infection and sepsis.
LanguageData.EE_CommandDeclareDeath_Desc: Abandon all rescue attempts for this patient and formally declare their death.
LanguageData.EE_Command_FastFirstAid_Desc: Select multiple wounded pawns; the doctor will perform first aid on them sequentially.\n\nRight-click to toggle first aid items.
LanguageData.EE_Command_FastFirstAid_Desc_Med: Select pawns that need first aid.\nCurrently using: {0}
LanguageData.EE_ConfirmDeclareDeathDesc: Are you sure you want to declare {0} dead? This will immediately terminate their life.
LanguageData.EE_LetterBrainDeathMods_Desc: {0} has suffered irreversible brain death due to severe cerebral necrosis from multiple organ failure, entering a permanent vegetative state.
LanguageData.EE_LetterBrainDeath_Desc: {0} has suffered irreversible brain death due to prolonged cerebral hypoxia and severe brain damage, entering a permanent vegetative state.
LanguageData.EE_LetterMyocardialInfarction_Desc: {0} has suffered a sudden myocardial infarction due to severe myocardial ischemia! Immediate rescue is required, otherwise it can easily deteriorate into ventricular fibrillation and cause death.
LanguageData.EE_LetterOrganFailure_Desc: {0}'s {1} has suffered irreversible necrosis due to prolonged ischemia from shock, developing into {2}! Organ transplantation is now required to restore this function.
LanguageData.EE_LetterOsteotomySuccess_Desc: {0} successfully performed an osteotomy on {1}. The malunited bone in the {2} has been surgically fractured and deformed tissues cleared. The limb is now back in an [Open Fracture] state. Please schedule proper reduction and fixation immediately!
LanguageData.EE_LetterSepsis_Desc: {0}'s wound infection has severely deteriorated into sepsis! If not treated promptly, it will trigger multiple organ dysfunction syndrome (MODS) and threaten life.
LanguageData.EE_LetterSpontaneousPneumothorax_Desc: {0} has suffered a spontaneous tension pneumothorax due to severely decreased lung compliance from acute respiratory distress syndrome (ARDS)!
LanguageData.EE_MessageCastingSuccess: [EE] Plaster casting successful: {0} casted {1}'s {2} with an alignment quality of {3}!
LanguageData.EE_MessageDebridementAccidentalAmputatio: Due to {0}'s clumsy debridement technique, {1}'s {2} was accidentally amputated completely!
LanguageData.EE_MessageDebridementSuccess: {0} successfully performed debridement on {1}, clearing contamination and necrotic tissue. This caused {2} points of cut damage.
LanguageData.EE_MessageFractureHealedPerfect: {0}'s {1} bone has fully healed with good alignment. Limb function is completely restored!
LanguageData.EE_MessageHeartAttackVFWorsened: {0}'s cardiac condition has severely worsened, deteriorating into fatal ventricular fibrillation!
LanguageData.EE_MessageIrrigationSuccess: {0} successfully performed wound irrigation on {1}, clearing filth and potential bacterial hazards.
LanguageData.EE_MessageMalunionCrippled: {0}'s {1} fracture has closed, but due to lack of proper reduction and rigid fixation, it has malunited, leaving a permanent disability/limp!
LanguageData.EE_MessageOrifSuccess: [EE] ORIF surgery successful: {0} performed internal fixation on {1}'s {2} with an alignment quality of {3}!
LanguageData.EE_MessageStrictBedrestFail: {0} failed to maintain absolute bed rest, causing the traditional bone setting fixation to fail and the bone to displace again!
LanguageData.EE_MessageTraditionalSettingSuccess: [EE] Traditional bone setting successful: {0} set {1}'s {2} with an alignment quality of {3}. The patient is now restricted to absolute bed rest!
LanguageData.EE_MessageWoundContaminatedInfection: {0}'s wound was excessively contaminated and has developed {1}!
LanguageData.EE_MoteDefibSideEffectBurn: Defib side effect: Mild skin burn
LanguageData.EE_MoteFractureDisplacedPain: {0} suffers severe pain from bone displacement!
LanguageData.EE_Settings_DifficultyPresetEasy: Easy - Fewer massive hemorrhages and fractures, more time to rescue
LanguageData.EE_Settings_DifficultyPresetRealistic: Realistic - Extremely high hemorrhage and fracture rates. Realistic, but are you sure?
LanguageData.EE_Settings_EnableDebugModeDesc: Testing only: Forces the rate of major crisis events (bleeding, fractures) to 90%.
LanguageData.EE_Settings_EnableDynamicMassiveBleeding: When enabled, single high-damage hits significantly increase the chance of massive bleeding. When disabled, uses a fixed base chance.
LanguageData.EE_Settings_EnableEcgGuiDesc: Display real-time dynamic ECG and SpO2 at the bottom when a pawn is selected.
LanguageData.EE_WoundContaminationWarningHigh: WARNING: High contamination. Extremely prone to severe infection. Debridement is highly recommended!
